name: Christmas Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the lime jello mixture by dissolving the package in boiling water and 1 cup of pineapple juice.
2. Pour the lime jello mixture into a square Pyrex dish measuring 10 x 10 inches and refrigerate for 3-4 hours until firm.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the lemon jello, remaining cup of pineapple juice, and marshmallows. Heat until melted and dissolved, then cool.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (cream cheese, pecans, salad dressing) to the cooled lemon jello mixture and mix well.
5. Pour the combined mixture over the chilled lime jello in the Pyrex dish and refrigerate.
